summary: All 5 backend tasks delivered: tracking start/end organizer-only endpoints (T-3-2), SOS WebSocket handler with FCM multicast and sosTriggeredAt dedup (T-3-3), GET /events/:eventId/route GeoJSON endpoint (T-3-4), maintenance 30d + event 24h @Cron reminders (T-3-5), GET /places/geocode Mapbox proxy. Two Prisma schema migrations created (events-ms routeGeoJson/sosTriggeredAt/reminderSentAt, maintenances-ms reminderSentAt). 44 unit tests pass (events-ms 19, api-gateway 25). nest build passes with zero TS errors on api-gateway, events-ms, and maintenances-ms.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.detail: backend.md, state.json, iteration_checkpoint.md, backend.json, backend-skill.md all written

qualityGates.name: tests_passed_or_accepted
qualityGates.detail: 44 unit tests pass: events-ms 19/19, api-gateway 25/25. nest build zero TS errors on 3 services.

qualityGates.name: security_checks
qualityGates.detail: All HTTP endpoints use FirebaseAuthGuard. No secrets in source. MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN in .env.example only. Organizer guard enforces ownerId === authUserId. SOS dedup prevents replay attacks.
